command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
# Mark log position, send real message, watch for processing + outbound
LINES_BEFORE=$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log)

curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/sendMessage" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"chat_id":"-1003934415467","text":"Sakura-chan please reply: I am online"}' >/dev/null
echo "real message sent, waiting 35s for llama3.2 to respond..."
sleep 35

echo "=== NEW gateway.log lines since message ==="
tail -n +$((LINES_BEFORE+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | tail -40

echo ""
echo "=== Any new agent.log activity (model calls) ==="
tail -15 /home/jose/.hermes/logs/agent.log 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "llama|model|response|sent|telegram|message" | tail -10
REMOTE
